title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how their organizations are adopting AI coding tools at scale. They share changes to development workflows, methods for measuring productivity gains, and recommendations for other engineering leaders implementing similar transitions.
